sourceMovie.title: Primate
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Primate works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Primate clicked for you, A Quiet Place: Day One (2024) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Primate?
faq.answer: Try A Quiet Place: Day One, 30 Days of Night, Beast—each shares DNA with Primate while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Primate?
faq.answer: Primate (2026) is best described as Horror, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Primate worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
